offer: For property managers handling 10-20 rental properties, inefficient tracking of maintenance requests causes delayed repairs. We provide a streamlined service request management tool instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets or emails.

try_it: Let users try simple request submission form and status tracking for maintenance requests on 1-3 items

Collect 10 short interviews from target users
